tags.name: `mc-card`
tags.description: A customizable card component that displays content in a structured format with optional images, headers, footers, and action buttons. Category: Content Display Purpose: Display content in a structured format. When to use: Content grouping, Highlighting information, Call-to-action sections, User profiles, Product listings, News lists When not to use: Decorative purposes, Full-page layouts, Large data set Works with components: mc-drawer, mc-modal, mc-popover Alternative component names: Content Card, Info Card, Action Card Slots: * ` ` {} - The default slot for the body content. * ``subheading`` {} - For adding tags / links etc. * ``actions`` {} - For adding links / buttons etc. * ``image`` {} - Image. * ``footer`` {} - Footer. Attributes: * `variant` {`CardVariant`} - Card variant * `orientation` {`Orientation`} - Card orientation * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit * `heading` {`string | undefined`} - Heading * `subheading` {`string | undefined`} - Sub heading * `body` {`string | undefined`} - Body * `footer` {`string | undefined`} - Footer * `contentalignment` {`ContentAlignment`} - How content (heading, subheading, body and footer) is aligned * `padding` {`string | undefined`} - Padding around all of the card's content. * `image` {`string | undefined`} - Image URL * `imagepercent` {`number | undefined`} - For vertical cards, this is the height of the image as a percentage of the card width, defaults to a 16:9 ratio (height = 56.25%) For horizontal cards, this is the width of the image as a percentage of the card width, defaults to 33%. * `imagescalestrength` {`ImageScaleStrength`} - Strength of the scale effect on the image * `imagebackgroundcolor` {`string | undefined`} - The background colour to display "under" the image as a fallback. Defaults to rgba(247,247,247,1) * `href` {`string | undefined`} - Passing a href value will render the card as a HTML anchor element. * `rel` {`string | undefined`} - The relationship of the linked URL as space-separated link types * `target` {`string | undefined`} - Where to display the linked URL, as the name for a browsing context (a tab, window, or iframe). * `clickable` {`boolean | undefined`} - If true, the card is will get clickable href style and can hook onto the click event. * `hasfooterslot` {`boolean`} - Explicitly set whether the footer slot has content. Use this property for server-side rendering (e.g., Next.js) where slot detection doesn't work during hydration. On client-side rendering, the footer slot is detected automatically. * `hasactionsslot` {`boolean`} - Explicitly set whether the actions slot has content. Use this property for server-side rendering (e.g., Next.js) where slot detection doesn't work during hydration. On client-side rendering, the actions slot is detected automatically. * `hasbodyslot` {`boolean`} - Explicitly set whether the body slot (default slot) has content. Use this property for server-side rendering (e.g., Next.js) where slot detection doesn't work during hydration. On client-side rendering, the body slot is detected automatically. * `hasimageslot` {`boolean`} - Explicitly set whether the image slot has content. Use this property for server-side rendering (e.g., Next.js) where slot detection doesn't work during hydration. On client-side rendering, the image slot is detected automatically. * `hassubheadingslot` {`boolean`} - Explicitly set whether the subheading slot has content. Use this property for server-side rendering (e.g., Next.js) where slot detection doesn't work during hydration. On client-side rendering, the subheading slot is detected automatically. Properties: * `bodySlotNodes` {`HTMLElement[]`} - * `actionsSlotNodes` {`HTMLElement[]`} - * `imageSlotNodes` {`HTMLElement[]`} - * `footerSlotNodes` {`HTMLElement[]`} - * `subheadingSlotNodes` {`HTMLElement[]`} - * `variant` {`CardVariant`} - Card variant * `orientation` {`Orientation`} - Card orientation * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit * `heading` {`string | undefined`} - Heading * `subheading` {`string | undefined`} - Sub heading * `body` {`string | undefined`} - Body * `footer` {`string | undefined`} - Footer * `contentalignment` {`ContentAlignment`} - How content (heading, subheading, body and footer) is aligned * `padding` {`string | undefined`} - Padding around all of the card's content. * `image` {`string | undefined`} - Image URL * `imagepercent` {`number | undefined`} - For vertical cards, this is the height of the image as a percentage of the card width, defaults to a 16:9 ratio (height = 56.25%) For horizontal cards, this is the width of the image as a percentage of the card width, defaults to 33%. * `imagescalestrength` {`ImageScaleStrength`} - Strength of the scale effect on the image * `imagebackgroundcolor` {`string | undefined`} - The background colour to display "under" the image as a fallback. Defaults to rgba(247,247,247,1) * `href` {`string | undefined`} - Passing a href value will render the card as a HTML anchor element. * `rel` {`string | undefined`} - The relationship of the linked URL as space-separated link types * `target` {`string | undefined`} - Where to display the linked URL, as the name for a browsing context (a tab, window, or iframe). * `clickable` {`boolean | undefined`} - If true, the card is will get clickable href style and can hook onto the click event. * `hasfooterslot` {`boolean`} - Explicitly set whether the footer slot has content. Use this property for server-side rendering (e.g., Next.js) where slot detection doesn't work during hydration. On client-side rendering, the footer slot is detected automatically. * `hasactionsslot` {`boolean`} - Explicitly set whether the actions slot has content. Use this property for server-side rendering (e.g., Next.js) where slot detection doesn't work during hydration. On client-side rendering, the actions slot is detected automatically. * `hasbodyslot` {`boolean`} - Explicitly set whether the body slot (default slot) has content. Use this property for server-side rendering (e.g., Next.js) where slot detection doesn't work during hydration. On client-side rendering, the body slot is detected automatically. * `hasimageslot` {`boolean`} - Explicitly set whether the image slot has content. Use this property for server-side rendering (e.g., Next.js) where slot detection doesn't work during hydration. On client-side rendering, the image slot is detected automatically. * `hassubheadingslot` {`boolean`} - Explicitly set whether the subheading slot has content. Use this property for server-side rendering (e.g., Next.js) where slot detection doesn't work during hydration. On client-side rendering, the subheading slot is detected automatically.
